---
title: "ContractId"
description: "This class is used as a super class for all concrete ContractIds generated by the java codegen with the following properties: Foo.ContractId fooCid = new Foo.ContractId(\"test\"); Bar.ContractId barCid = new Bar.ContractId(\"test\"); ContractId<Foo> genericFooCid = new ContractId<>(\"test\"); ContractId<Foo> genericBarCid = new ContractId<>(\"test\"); fooCid.equals(genericFooCid) == true; genericFooCid.equals(fooCid) == true; fooCid.equals(barCid) == false; barCid.equals(fooCid) == false; Due to erase, we cannot distinguish ContractId<Foo> from ContractId<Bar>, thus: fooCid.equals(genericBarCid) == true genericBarCid.equals(fooCid) == true genericFooCid.equals(genericBarCid) == true genericBarCid.equals(genericFooCid) == true"
---
